title: 緊急開店！キタちゃんマッサージ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It was a regular day just like any other.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I've finished my incline dashes!
choice_data_list: Great. Let's take a quick brea—

text_block_list.name: Voice from the East
text_block_list.text: Great... Just great. The track's closed off... What to do?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Sounds like somebody's in trouble... Trainer,
I'll be back in a sec—

text_block_list.name: Voice from the West
text_block_list.text: Someone, help! It's Gold Ship! Gold Ship just—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Someone needs help over there too!
Wh-what should I do?!
choice_data_list: I'll handle the situation over there!
I'll handle the situation over there!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks a ton! I'll go over to help as soon as I
can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is always ready to lend a hand to
others. That day, she kept helping people one
after another until finally...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm glad we were able to help everyone
with their problems.
choice_data_list: You got in a great training session, too.
You got in a great training session, too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Only because you pitched in too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sorry for dragging you into all that!
choice_data_list: No need to apologize. I was happy to help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black never has any ulterior motives.
Instead, she helps others for the sheer sake of
helping them. It's only natural to want to support
someone so purely altruistic.
choice_data_list:
Your kindness makes me proud to be your
trainer.

Your kindness makes me proud to be your
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Trainer? Are you heading straight home?
choice_data_list: After a bit more work, yes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm coming in!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Kita the traveling masseuse is here to help you
relax, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yep! As you might already know, I'm a pretty
good masseuse!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My mom taught her special massage techniques
to me. Thanks to her, I always felt great when I
was growing up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'd like you to experience the skill I've
honed!
choice_data_list: I can't make you do that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But you're not making me do anything. I want to help you...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You know, Trainer, I'm always looking for ways to
support you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always want to thank you, see if
there's anything bothering you, and try to find
ways to help...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And I can give pretty mean massages, y'know! So
is it okay? Or...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Really?! Then leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oookay! Where would you like me to work on?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hup! C'mon, leg muscles! Loosen up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And to help you run faster, I'll... Wait, you don't
need that, do you, Trainer? Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gratitude comes across in each strong press,
soothing both my muscles and spirit...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Would you lay face down, please?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer? What do you think? ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Hehehe, out like a light. Sleep well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gentle massage puts me into a deep slumber,
soothing both my muscles and spirit...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Hold on, let me get behind you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hup... Hup... Well? Am I good at this or what?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
People line up to get shoulder massages from
yours truly all the time. Also—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She entertains me with stories from her past as
she works my shoulders, soothing both my
muscles and spirit...
